Operation 'privateca.projects.locations.reusableConfigs.testIamPermissions' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, missing_context, missing_output_details, poor_ai_interpretability. The operation lacks a summary entirely, making it difficult for AI agents to quickly understand its purpose. The description, while detailed, needs clarification about the specific resource type (reusable config) and explicit mention of what is returned (list of permissions). Added context about the operation's intended use case and clarified that it returns the caller's actual permissions, not a boolean check. This improves AI agent interpretability for determining when to invoke this operation.

data.current_description: Returns permissions that a caller has on the specified resource. If the resource does not exist, this will return an empty set of permissions, not a `NOT_FOUND` error. Note: This operation is designed to be used for building permission-aware UIs and command-line tools, not for authorization checking. This operation may "fail open" without warning.
data.summary_suggestion: Test IAM permissions on reusable config
data.description_suggestion: Tests which IAM permissions the authenticated caller has on the specified reusable config resource. Returns a list of permissions the caller possesses. If the resource does not exist, returns an empty permission set rather than a NOT_FOUND error. This operation is intended for building permission-aware UIs and CLI tools, not for authorization enforcement. Note: This operation may fail open without warning.
data.reasoning: The operation lacks a summary entirely, making it difficult for AI agents to quickly understand its purpose. The description, while detailed, needs clarification about the specific resource type (reusable config) and explicit mention of what is returned (list of permissions). Added context about the operation's intended use case and clarified that it returns the caller's actual permissions, not a boolean check. This improves AI agent interpretability for determining when to invoke this operation.

message: Operation 'privateca.projects.locations.operations.delete' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, missing_context. Missing summary entirely. Description lacks clarity about the distinction between deletion and cancellation, and doesn't explain the return value. Added summary and clarified that deletion removes the operation from the list but doesn't cancel it, improving AI agent understanding of when to use this operation versus cancel.

data.current_description: Deletes a long-running operation. This method indicates that the client is no longer interested in the operation result. It does not cancel the operation. If the server doesn't support this method, it returns `google.rpc.Code.UNIMPLEMENTED`.
data.description_suggestion: Deletes a long-running operation from the server. This method indicates that the client is no longer interested in the operation result and removes it from the operation list. Note: This does not cancel the operation itself; use the cancel method to stop an in-progress operation. Returns an empty response on success. If the server doesn't support this method, it returns `google.rpc.Code.UNIMPLEMENTED`.
data.reasoning: Missing summary entirely. Description lacks clarity about the distinction between deletion and cancellation, and doesn't explain the return value. Added summary and clarified that deletion removes the operation from the list but doesn't cancel it, improving AI agent understanding of when to use this operation versus cancel.

message: Operation 'privateca.projects.locations.operations.cancel' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, missing_output_details. Missing summary. Description is verbose and unclear about the return value. Simplified and clarified that the method returns immediately with an empty response, and that clients must use GetOperation to verify cancellation status. Added summary for better AI agent understanding of the operation's purpose and expected behavior.

data.current_description: Starts asynchronous cancellation on a long-running operation. The server makes a best effort to cancel the operation, but success is not guaranteed. If the server doesn't support this method, it returns `google.rpc.Code.UNIMPLEMENTED`. Clients can use Operations.GetOperation or other methods to check whether the cancellation succeeded or whether the operation completed despite cancellation. On successful cancellation, the operation is not deleted; instead, it becomes an operation with an Operation.error value with a google.rpc.Status.code of `1`, corresponding to `Code.CANCELLED`.
data.description_suggestion: Initiates asynchronous cancellation of a long-running operation. The server makes a best effort to cancel the operation, but success is not guaranteed. Returns an empty response immediately. To verify cancellation status, use GetOperation to check if the operation has an error status with code CANCELLED. Note: Cancellation is best-effort; the operation may complete before cancellation takes effect. If the server doesn't support this method, it returns `google.rpc.Code.UNIMPLEMENTED`.
data.reasoning: Missing summary. Description is verbose and unclear about the return value. Simplified and clarified that the method returns immediately with an empty response, and that clients must use GetOperation to verify cancellation status. Added summary for better AI agent understanding of the operation's purpose and expected behavior.

data.current_description: Sets the access control policy on the specified resource. Replaces any existing policy. Can return `NOT_FOUND`, `INVALID_ARGUMENT`, and `PERMISSION_DENIED` errors.
data.summary_suggestion: Set IAM policy for a reusable configuration
data.description_suggestion: Sets the access control policy on the specified reusable configuration resource, replacing any existing policy. Requires the SetIamPolicyRequest with the new policy definition. Returns the updated Policy object on success. Can return `NOT_FOUND` if the resource doesn't exist, `INVALID_ARGUMENT` if the policy is malformed, and `PERMISSION_DENIED` if the caller lacks permission to modify the policy.
data.reasoning: Missing summary. Description lacks information about the return value (Policy object) and input requirements. Added summary and clarified that the method returns the updated Policy object and requires SetIamPolicyRequest input, improving AI agent understanding of the operation's inputs and outputs.
